name: unifable
description: unifable — run Opus (or any model) like Fable: completion, evidence, and verification enforced as procedure, auto-routed per task.

plugins.name: unifable
plugins.description: A harness that makes the model behave like Fable: enforces completion, evidence, and verification as procedure; auto-routes render-output verification, a multi-story evidence gate, an investigation protocol, and an early-stop guard.
